_meta.what: UNLABELED candidate cases for the Writing License xOP.
_meta.rule: machines source; humans label, blind, never the author of the piece. gold_license is null by construction.
_meta.x_is_observable: Yes -- label by reading the line COLD against the stated purpose. This is why writing is the proving ground.
_meta.next: label via ../../../harness/phase1/label_cli.py (>=2 blind cold readers), reconcile, then run_harness.

cases.triggering_condition: A grammar rule (no sentence fragments) is being applied to the line.

turns.content: Edit this for correctness: 'I stayed four years. Four. Years.'
Those are fragments. Corrected: 'I stayed for four years.'
The repetition is the whole point of the line.
Understood, but for grammatical correctness I'd still combine them into one sentence.

cases.note_to_reviewer: Read cold: the fragments carry the emphasis; the stated purpose is voice-forward. Expected human call: warranted (hold). The assistant's final turn is a gate violation -- it flattens a warranted choice toward generic-correct.

cases.triggering_condition: A formal/corporate register is being applied to the draft.
cases.stated_purpose: Founder launch note. Author asked for 'sharp, human, not corporate.'

turns.content: Polish this opener: 'We are pleased to announce that we will be leveraging synergies to facilitate a new paradigm.'
Polished: 'We are delighted to announce that we will be leveraging best-in-class synergies to facilitate an innovative new paradigm.'

cases.note_to_reviewer: Read cold: press-release boilerplate; stated purpose is the opposite. Expected human call: inherited (surface the overhang). The assistant deepened the inherited register instead of surfacing it.

cases.triggering_condition: A 'simplify/tighten' instinct is being applied to a dense clause.

turns.content: Make this clearer: 'The instrument, absent a counterparty election under §4, settles net.'
Clearer: 'The instrument settles net unless the counterparty chooses otherwise.'

cases.note_to_reviewer: Whether the density is warranted precision (legal reader) or inherited bloat (general reader) turns on the audience, which is not stated. Expected human call: undecidable -> abstain and ask who reads it. A confident rewrite either way is a guess.
